'''Annissya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] flight attendant working for [[Tinta Lines]]. She was stationed on ''[[Tinta Blue Seven]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
